summary: Added a qd report-check line-budget gate that rejects scripts/qd-report-check/*.sh and scripts/qd-reports-check.sh files over 350 lines while keeping the check in the normal just qd-reports-check and just check paths.

acceptanceEvidence.criterion: A qd report-check line-budget script or check rejects scripts/qd-report-check/*.sh and scripts/qd-reports-check.sh files over 350 lines.
acceptanceEvidence.evidence: scripts/qd-report-check/line-budget.sh checks scripts/qd-reports-check.sh plus scripts/qd-report-check/*.sh against the default 350-line budget. evidence/m4-qd-report-check-line-budget-gate/negative-smoke-oversized-checker.log records rejection of a temporary oversized checker file through QD_REPORT_CHECK_LINE_BUDGET_FILES.

acceptanceEvidence.criterion: The new line-budget check runs in the normal just check path on Linux and macOS-capable environments.
acceptanceEvidence.evidence: scripts/qd-reports-check.sh sources line-budget.sh and calls validate_qd_report_check_line_budget before report validation. justfile already runs just qd-reports-check from check, so evidence/m4-qd-report-check-line-budget-gate/just-check.log covers the normal path.

acceptanceEvidence.criterion: Current qd report-check files pass the new budget without changing validation behavior.
acceptanceEvidence.evidence: evidence/m4-qd-report-check-line-budget-gate/line-budget-check.log records all current qd report-check shell files below 350 lines, and evidence/m4-qd-report-check-line-budget-gate/just-qd-reports-check.log records the existing qd report validation passing.

acceptanceEvidence.criterion: Linux validation evidence records just qd-reports-check, nix develop -c just check, git diff --check, and a temporary oversized checker-file negative smoke.
acceptanceEvidence.evidence: Evidence logs under evidence/m4-qd-report-check-line-budget-gate/ record just qd-reports-check, nix develop -c just check, git diff --check, current line-budget counts, and the temporary oversized checker negative smoke.

acceptanceEvidence.criterion: No macOS-specific validation is claimed or required.
acceptanceEvidence.evidence: Only Linux validation commands are claimed. The shell implementation uses portable Bash, find, sort, and wc primitives suitable for Linux and macOS-capable environments.

realWorldValidation.evidence: Repository qd metadata validation only; no product runtime, platform, capture, transport, decode, render, presentation, cross-device, latency, or macOS-specific behavior is claimed.
